task: Per-driver + per-truck minute ledger. READ-ONLY reporting (no financial writes). Surfaces UNACCOUNTED time. $/productive-hr, $/driving-hr, utilization%. Reuses analytics schema for rate inputs. Computed-summary events logged to spine via log_event(). UI: Finance > Time Utilization, By Driver / By Truck / Detail. Schema: utilization (driver_period, unit_period).
